expo.name: VibeForge Studio
expo.description: VibeForge Studio — AI-powered app builder and cognitive engine. Build, preview, and deploy apps with multi-model AI orchestration.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VibeForge uses your camera to let you capture images for use in your app projects.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VibeForge accesses your photo library so you can select images for your app projects.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: VibeForge saves generated images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VibeForge uses the microphone for voice input features in the AI engine.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: VibeForge uses Face ID to securely authenticate your account.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VibeForge may use your location to provide region-specific AI recommendations.

plugins.photosPermission: VibeForge accesses your photo library so you can select images for your app projects.
